brief: Link pubblico 'copia commissione' album per la stampa, auto-importato da impaginato+selezione, senza wetransfer/mail

goals.title: DB
goals.objective: album_orders += share_token + file_link; RPC album_commission_share (owner) + album_commission_by_token (pubblica anon)
goals.evidence: supabase db push OK: 20260708200000_album_commission_link.sql. album_orders += share_token/file_link; RPC album_commission_share(authenticated) + album_commission_by_token(anon)

goals.title: Pagina pubblica
goals.objective: /p/commissione/:token — scheda commissione stampabile (specifiche + copertina + selezione + contatti fotografo + link file)
goals.evidence: npm run build verde. CommissionPage pubblica /p/commissione/:token: scheda stampabile (evento+selezione, album formato/pagine/copie, copertina modello/materiale/colore/box/rifiniture, note, link file, contatti fotografo). Legge album_commission_by_token

goals.title: UI fotografo
goals.objective: in CoverConfigurator bottone 'Genera link commissione' (rivedi note+link file, auto-import) → copia link
goals.evidence: CoverConfigurator: bottone 'Link per la stampa' + dialog (note/link file, riepilogo copie+copertina) → shareAlbumCommission → copia URL /p/commissione/:token
